overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily forward from an open intersection with wet reflective asphalt into a covered urban corridor beneath an elevated highway, passing neon-lit commercial buildings and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city intersection with crosswalk and neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: entering covered area beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking across wet crosswalk toward covered street section ahead

notable_agents.action: blue sports car parked along the left curb

yellow striped pedestrian crossing on wet reflective asphalt
sleek blue vehicle parked at the curb
elevated concrete highway casting shadows over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city intersection at night, with a yellow crosswalk stretching across the reflective asphalt. A neon-lit office tower rises on the left while street trees line the sidewalk. The camera walks steadily forward toward an overpass structure ahead, passing a parked blue sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street beneath elevated highway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the covered corridor beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: small group of figures walking in the distance toward the camera

entered.detail: commercial building with stylized signage and checkered base pattern
large illuminated advertisement screen hanging above the street center
line of vehicles parked along the left curb

segments.scene_description: Now beneath the elevated highway, the scene becomes a covered urban corridor with artificial neon lighting. The Joss building with its distinctive signage dominates the right side while parked cars line the left. A digital billboard glows in the distance ahead where a few pedestrians walk toward the camera. The wet asphalt continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights as the camera moves deeper into the covered street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from an open, rain-slicked city intersection into a sheltered urban corridor beneath an elevated highway. It begins by crossing a yellow crosswalk on reflective asphalt, passing a neon-lit office tower and a parked blue sports car. As the camera advances, the open night sky is replaced by the heavy concrete of an overpass, shifting the environment into a covered street illuminated by artificial neon glows. The scene then expands to reveal the Joss building and its distinctive signage on the right, while the camera moves deeper into the corridor past parked vehicles toward a glowing digital billboard and distant pedestrians.
